shorts.title_distilled: ​‘The Office US’ cast: Where the Dunder Mifflin folks are now​.
shorts.description: Over ten years since the last episode, ‘The Office US’ is still one of the all-time favorites. This mockumentary about the oddball staff at Dunder Mifflin in Scranton, Pennsylvania, first hit screens in 2005 and stuck around for nine seasons, wrapping up in 2…

shorts.title_distilled: AI boom has plunged a small Pennsylvania town into chaos.
shorts.description: Data centers will swallow 14 percent of Archbald, evict a trailer park, and border many residential properties. Who's to blame is a matter of fierce debate.

shorts.title: Scouts across NEPA mark major moment in USA history
shorts.title_distilled: Scouts across NEPA mark major moment in USA history.
shorts.description: TUNKHANNOCK, WYOMING COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — Scouts across northeastern Pennsylvania are helping mark a major moment in American history. Scouts with Scouting America joined members of the Wyoming County Sheriff's Office at the Wyoming County Courthouse for a ceremonial flag lowering on Wednesday. The event is part of Lite to Unite, a statewide effort honoring America's [...]
shorts.content: TUNKHANNOCK, WYOMING COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — Scouts across northeastern Pennsylvania are helping mark a major moment in American history. The event is part of Lite to Unite, a statewide effort honoring America's [...]
